tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

recommended.song_name: Saving All My Love For You

content:
Hallo, my name is Vladimir, Im from Serbia.
...if you know how, this is very funny to play on guitar!

I don't want no fly guy

You know what I want, yeah
